title: A KdV conservative update preserves total mass under periodic flux

source.notes: Periodic-flux version of the KdV conservative mass-preservation theorem.

informal.statement: If the KdV-like flux satisfies the periodic boundary condition over n cells, then the KdV conservative update preserves the total.
assumptions: scale, nonlinear, and dispersion are real numbers
u is a real-valued grid state
n is the number of cells in the finite range
periodicBoundary holds for the KdV conservative flux
informal.expected_conclusion: The finite total is invariant under the periodic-flux KdV conservative update.

declarations.name: totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux
declarations.statement: theorem totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u) n) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n = totalOn u n

tasks.input: Translate periodic-flux total preservation for the KdV conservative update into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u) n) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n = totalOn u n

tasks.input: Given the boundary-equality KdV total theorem, complete the periodic-flux proof.
